# README assets

Images referenced by the root [`README.md`](../../README.md).

| File                 | Shot                                                          |
| -------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `session.png`        | Hero — live session with the feedback/summary panel open      |
| `login.png`          | Passwordless email + OTP login                                |
| `conversations.png`  | Conversations dashboard (activity heatmap, stats, list)       |
| `create.png`         | Conversation builder ("Select conversation type")             |

To refresh a screenshot, just replace the file (keep the same name) with a new capture.
